title: Crosshair Attack Indicator
description: "A highly responsive indicator that tints the crosshair red when aiming at a living entity within reach. Optimized for PvP with frame-perfect hitbox interpolation and zero delay.
body:
🎯 Crosshair Attack Indicator

Short Description
A lightning-fast, frame-perfect indicator that turns your crosshair red when a hit is ready.
Zero delay, fully interpolated for competitive PvP.

🔥 Master Your Reach

Crosshair Attack Indicator is the ultimate lightweight companion for competitive Minecraft PvP.
It provides instant visual confirmation the exact moment your target enters your reach — ensuring you never miss a critical opening again.

⚔️ Built for PvP Elites

This mod is optimized to meet the intensity of high-stakes combat, focusing on precision, speed, and reliability.

⚡ Absolute Zero Delay

The indicator reacts the exact millisecond you aim at a target.
It bypasses the 20-tick game speed, delivering a true high-FPS experience with no artificial delay.

🎯 Frame-Perfect Precision

Using advanced Hitbox Interpolation, the mod tracks enemies between game ticks.
The red tint stays perfectly locked to your target, even during fast strafing and high-speed movement.

🩸 No-Cooldown Mode

React instantly based on reach and visibility, regardless of your weapon’s recharge state.
If the target is hittable, your crosshair turns red — no exceptions.

💎 Premium Compatibility

Works seamlessly with custom resource packs.
Instead of replacing your crosshair, the mod intelligently tints it, preserving your original design.

🛡️ Performance Focused

• Client-side only
• Zero performance impact
• Safe to use on any server

Designed to be lightweight, efficient, and competitive-ready.
